campaign_target_pattern: Lookups suggest harvester pulled targets from public corporate LinkedIn listings. Targeting non-technical departments where credential reuse and phishing susceptibility is typically higher.
mfa_coverage_for_targets: 44 of 47 targets are MFA-enrolled (FIDO2 or TOTP). 3 are exempt due to legacy app dependencies and have compensating controls.
ticketing_notes: Three users (Finance team) submitted phishing reports via the Defender for O365 'Report message' button within 8 minutes of email delivery. Security awareness training is mandatory for all staff with refresher completed within the last 12 months by 100% of targets.
